acp.name: ~query.0.1
acp.a:value: SELECT TABLE_NAME FROM information_schema.TABLES WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA='prisonerservices'

acp.name: ~query.0.1
acp.a:value: SELECT table_name, column_name, is_nullable, data_type, character_maximum_length, column_key FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA=ac!schemaName AND TABLE_NAME=ac!tableName

output-exprs.el: tableConfig&:a!map( tableName: index('ac!~1<table_name', 1, null), columns: #"SYSTEM_SYSRULES_forEach"( items: 'ac!~1<column_name', expression: a!map( name: fv!item, isNullable: 'ac!~1<is_nullable'[fv!index], type: 'ac!~1<data_type'[fv!index], characterLength: 'ac!~1<character_maximum_length'[fv!index], key: 'ac!~1<column_key'[fv!index], ) ) )

annotation.text: Update the data source to the source you use in your application, in both nodes
